top_recommended_action: Pause or cap poor-payback channels and reallocate budget to higher-retention sources.

leakage_items.problem: Some acquisition channels are producing weak payback or high-risk subscribers.
leakage_items.recommended_action: Pause or cap poor-payback channels and reallocate budget to higher-retention sources.

leakage_items.problem: Late shipments are hitting customers who already have elevated churn probability.
leakage_items.recommended_action: Escalate late orders for high-margin subscribers before renewal windows.

leakage_items.problem: Forecasted demand exceeds available units for subscription SKUs.
leakage_items.recommended_action: Advance purchase orders for high-margin SKUs with supplier lead-time risk.
